creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #0)
(In reply to Einar Bjarni Halldórsson from comment #1)

These ports (www/py-dj{40,41}-django-redis) were added for net-mgmt/netbox. Therefore, I followed the version constraint.

Kai (maintainer of net-mgmt/netbox) provides a different patch in bug #270792. Let's continue the discussion there to see what is the best solution.

Thanks.
